items.title: How Canada's largest gun control effort in decades is missing the mark
items.dek: Canada recently banned 2,500 models of "assault-style" firearms - but a plan to buy-back tens of thousands of guns fell short by half.
items.body: Canada recently banned 2,500 models of "assault-style" firearms - but a plan to buy-back tens of thousands of guns fell short by half.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'We want a voice in our land' - the people evicted to build Nigeria's capital
items.dek: People evicted to build Nigeria's capital accuse the government of failing to fulfill its promises to them.
items.body: People evicted to build Nigeria's capital accuse the government of failing to fulfill its promises to them.
